parameters.formDescription: Pick a sample query, or choose Custom and type your own below.

parameters.text:
=You are a support-ticket classifier for CodeBasics, an ed-tech platform. Read the learner message and respond with ONLY a raw JSON object (no markdown, no code fences) using this exact schema:
{"category": one of ["course_access","refund","escalation_human","other"], "intent": "<one short sentence>", "sentiment": "positive|neutral|negative", "confidence": <number 0-1>, "escalation_reason": "<string or null>"}

Routing rules:
- "course_access": cannot log in, can't open course/videos, password or login problems, account locked.
- "refund": any request for a refund or money back.
- "escalation_human": billing disputes, 'payment failed but money was deducted', duplicate or double charges, genuine technical bugs, partnership/business enquiries, legal threats, or anything that clearly needs a human. Always fill escalation_reason for this category.
- "other": certificate download, discounts/sales timing, course guidance, and general questions.

Learner message: """{{ $json.queryText }}"""

parameters.jsCode:
const acct = $('Lookup Learner Account').first().json;
const reply = ($json.text || $json.response || '').toString().trim();
return { json: {
  learnerName: acct.learnerName,
  learnerEmail: acct.learnerEmail,
  queryText: acct.queryText,
  category: acct.category,
  intent: acct.intent,
  courseName: acct.courseName,
  orderId: acct.orderId,
  agentReply: reply,
  status: 'auto_resolved',
  handledBy: 'AI Agent',
  ticketId: '',
  priority: 'normal',
  slaHours: 0,
  internalNote: 'Auto-resolved by AI agent (' + acct.category + ').',
  timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
} };
